releaseNotes: Multi-device sync. Two devices (your Windows + your phone, or two computers in the same pharmacy) can now share an inventory by syncing through OneDrive or another cloud folder. Open Settings → Sync, tap 'Set up sync (first device)', pick a folder, share the 6-character setup code with the other device(s) so they can join. Decrements add additively across devices, edits last-write-wins by Lamport clock, and the activity feed records every cross-device replay so you can audit what came from where.
